content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — App is login-gated (App/LoginView.swift:1-14, SecureField) but review_information contains only placeholder values: demo_user.txt="test", demo_password.txt="changeme", notes.txt="TBD".
Pierre: Apple reviewers need working credentials and clear instructions to reach core features behind the login wall; without them the app will likely be rejected as unable to be reviewed. Here the demo account and notes are all placeholders, effectively empty from Apple's perspective. Fix by provisioning a real test account (with backend enabled) and writing notes describing exact steps to reach gated features.
